channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti in Station Avenue, 3rd May
item.description:
Station Avenue is between Jay Jay Barbers and victorias. Graffiti is at the end of the avenue on the left on the brick wall. Put there over the weekend. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 212, Coldharbour Lane, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged road around manhole cover due to amount of heavy vehicles and buses., 3rd May
item.description:
There is a manhole cover in the middle of the road and due to the sheer amount of buses that travel over it, the road has been severely damaged. This now results is buses bouncing over it and causing vibrations through nearby houses.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandhurst Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple cars parked and blocking footpath, 3rd May
item.description:
I visit my elderly mother regularly who lives in this road. She is unsteady on her feet and when we try to walk to the local park for her exercise and mental wellbeing, as she is unable to get out on her own, I am constantly finding this junction pathway blocked by a multitude of different vehicles. I have knocked on the house door and tried to explain to different residents about the difficulty in getting past to which I have had no success. It is a public nuisance but more importantly a danger as the last time (earlier this morning) we went out we had to walk in the actual road to get past and were nearly run over by a car. Something needs to be done as the residents do not care.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Caldecot Avenue, Broxbourne
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping, 3rd May
item.description:
Dumped waste bags and scattered litter on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): George Mathers Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various, 3rd May
item.description:
Various

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaconsfield Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Woman dumping bags in bin, 3rd May
item.description:
Saw a woman dump this bin bag and push others in the bin then drive off. Didn’t get her reg sadly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southborough Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted household goods dumped on the pavement by resident, 3rd May
item.description:
As above- fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beatty Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner Martaban Rd. / Listria Park., 3rd May
item.description:
This abandoned bike is a public space problem. Before there was a red bike, now a black one since a few months back. I am treated for cancer making me very unstable and this abandoned bike causes a hazard on the pavement for me. This is dangerous.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Martaban Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various fly tips, 3rd May
item.description:
Various fly tips for collection from Charles Grinling Walk please

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): John Wilson Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing Sign, 3rd May
item.description:
Just off Terrace Straight where it intersects with Ledrington Road, there is a sign missing. Please can you replace the sign or remove the redundant street furniture if it is no longer functional? Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ledrington Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing cycle stand, 3rd May
item.description:
Damage to pavement - missing cycle stand just hole in pavement where it was

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Denny Street, Kennington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Pavement Defect (uneven surface / cracked paving slab)

item.title: Dumped bins bags on corner of Colenso and Millfields, 3rd May
item.description:
Bags torn open rubbish scattered.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Millfields Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish dumped on street by bike hanger (every day), 3rd May
item.description:
There is rubbish dumped at this spot almost daily, often from the flats north of the church and across on the east side of the street. People on the street then open the bags looking for anything valuable and spread it out leaving a worse mess

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Antisemitic graffiti on parking meter, 3rd May
item.description:
There is antisemitic graffiti on this parking meter that needs removing. It’s in Glenlea Road between Glenesk and Westmount Road. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenlea Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On cementry wall as you enter East Wickham space from camdale Rd, 3rd May
item.description:
Graffiti in cemetery wall

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Radial Path, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing and Bent Sign Post, 3rd May
item.description:
At the top of Anerley Hill (heading down the hill) from Crystal Palace and just before the Crystal Palace Museum on the nearside, there is a signpost immediately behind the two-way traffic sign which has been removed and the post has been bent. Please can you remove this redundant post or restore the missing sign? Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2A, Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bus shelter, 3rd May
item.description:
Graffiti on the glass panels of the bus shelter at Kennington Station bus stop (Stop KB).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kennington Park Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: A litter bin outside the convenience store, 3rd May
item.description:
There is always lots of rubbish outside the convenience store and between brodrick grove, a bin would be great

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abbey Grove, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Urgent Repair Needed – Damaged and Faulty Taps at Bourne Road Allotments, 3rd May
item.description:
Dear Sir/Madam, I am writing to report urgent issues with damaged and faulty taps at Bourne Road Allotments in Bexley. Tap No. 5 is currently not in working condition and appears to be damaged. It is not usable and requires repair or replacement. In addition, Tap No. 6, located near plot 40A, is producing extremely low water pressure. The flow is only a thin stream, almost a drip, which suggests there may be a blockage or internal fault. Other taps on the site are working normally, so these problems appear to be isolated to these specific taps. These issues are affecting access to water for maintaining plots, so I would appreciate it if they could be inspected and repaired as soon as possible. Thank you for your attention to this matter. Yours faithfully,

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large fridge and broken furniture on the pavement, 3rd May
item.description:
Items are left here every single day

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lampard Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
